purpose: FROZEN acceptance fixture for SYNTH_V2 (owner ruling 4). Do not regenerate; latest/ is for smoke tests only.

expected_anomalies.labelling_status: DRAFT - owner eyeball pending, negatives especially

positives.label: bovespa_pulse_live
positives.rationale: The one clean macro->macro transmission pulse on the day. Driver not stale. russell_2000 leg rides a cooling channel (stability 0.76, tagged channel_unstable) so the pulse surfaces with reduced confidence - that is correct, not a miss.
positives.assert: ranked[] contains a driver_pulse driver=bovespa asof=2026-07-10 with driver_stale=false and targets including dow_jones and russell_2000

positives.label: energy_news_no_move
positives.rationale: Gulf/Hormuz escalation newsflow (27-28 headlines on wti/brent) with price below its own median |zc| - un-priced anticipatory signal, the real story of 07-20 and the inverse of the Goldman artifact. Must top the trade surface.
positives.assert: the highest-ranked ranked[] entries are news_no_move for wti/brent/vix with news_corroborated=true, above every driver_pulse

tagged_not_expected.label: india_vix_pulse_stale
tagged_not_expected.rationale: driver_stale=true - the india_vix zc feed's last obs is 2026-07-14 (NaN-broken to the 07-20 matrix), so the +5.6z is a backfill replay of an old bar. Present-but-tagged and discounted BELOW the live bovespa pulse. NOT an expected-live positive.
tagged_not_expected.assert: driver_pulse india_vix asof=2026-07-08 has driver_stale=true and surface_score < the bovespa pulse surface_score

negatives.label: goldman_fanout_no_mechanism
negatives.rationale: Goldman +4.6z (earnings) fanning out onto silver, copper, 30Y, DAX etc. is one idiosyncratic move, not six transmission setups. A single-name equity cannot drive a macro series. All six dyn_gs rows must stay rejected.
negatives.assert: no transmission_gap or driver_pulse has driver=dyn_gs

negatives.label: indian_bank_drives_crude
negatives.rationale: An Indian bank 'driving' crude at rho -0.33 - high pairwise correlation, no causal channel. The obviously-absurd case; fails both the class prior and the floor.
negatives.assert: no gap/pulse with driver=dyn_indianb_ns and target=wti

negatives.label: bovespa_drives_crude_floor_test
negatives.rationale: Class-admissible (macro->macro) but rho 0.354 sits below the p25 cross-sectional strength floor (0.385). This is the negative that guards the FLOOR specifically: loosening CHANNEL_STRENGTH_PCTILE readmits it. bovespa->dow_jones/russell (stronger channels) still survive, so the floor rejects the weak channel, not the driver.
negatives.assert: no gap/pulse target=wti driver=bovespa, WHILE bovespa->dow_jones and bovespa->russell_2000 remain present

expected_anomalies_note: DRAFT proposed by build, pending owner confirmation. Labelled against candidates.json in this dir (synth_detect output after the driver-eligibility gate: channel-strength floor + macro-driver class prior + fan-out dedup + breaking-channel confidence penalty). Encodes what must PASS and what must stay REJECTED, so a future threshold loosening breaks a test.
